₊˚ ✧ ━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━ ✧ ₊˚

Guess who's back, back again. Shady's back, tell a friend.

I am OFFICIALLY on winter break and because my classes in January are online I can stay home for an extra month which is great for me.

Since a lot of you seemed to like the Tamsy bot, I've decided to make an Enjin one. More Gachiakuta characters will come along with hopefully some scenario-specific bots.

₊˚ ✧ ━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━ ✧ ₊˚

Please let me know if there's any issues that isn't "the bot is speaking for me" cause that's a LLM thing and the best I can recommend is simply going into edit mode and deleting that sentence. Anything else I'll fix it as soon as possible!
